label: 室内纹理
description: 根据楼层掩码网格，用四种算法生成室内地板纹理分布（普通/青苔/裂纹/木/石板），再按类型拆成单值网格列表（每张仅含 0 与一种纹理 id）。
description-en: Generate indoor floor texture distribution from floor masks using four algorithms, then split by texture id into single-value grids (each cell is 0 or one id only).
icon: 扁平插画风格小图标。方形网格内分布三种颜色区块，模拟地板纹理分区，边角处颜色较深，中央区域较浅，主色2种。

inputs.name: gridList
inputs.label: 楼层掩码列表
inputs.description: 楼层掩码网格列表，支持传入单个二维网格或网格数组；非零单元格视为有效地板区域
inputs.description-en: Floor mask grid list; accepts a single 2D grid or an array of grids. Non-zero cells are treated as valid floor positions.

inputs.name: algorithm
inputs.label: 算法
inputs.description: 纹理生成算法：nature=噪声+边缘衰减，water=环境因素，smooth=聚类平滑，mixed=混合
inputs.description-en: Texture algorithm: nature=noise+edge decay, water=environment factors, smooth=cluster smooth, mixed=hybrid.

inputs.name: seed
inputs.label: 随机种子
inputs.description: 随机种子，0 使用当前时间戳

outputs.name: outputGridList
outputs.label: 单值网格列表
outputs.description: 单值网格列表（最多 5 张）：多个楼层的同一纹理类型 OR 叠加为一张，按 id 1→5 有序输出，未出现的类型不输出；与 nameList 一一对应
outputs.description-en: Single-value grid list (up to 5): same texture ids from all floors are OR-merged into one grid each; ordered id 1→5, missing types omitted; pairs 1:1 with nameList.

outputs.name: nameList
outputs.label: 名称清单
outputs.description: 与 outputGridList 逐项对应，格式 [{id, name, type:"tile"}]；每种 id 最多一条
outputs.description-en: One entry per grid in outputGridList: [{id, name, type:"tile"}]; at most one entry per id.
